expectations.text: [holdout_regression][blocking] Case focus is explicitly covered: skill improvements for report-editor do not regress a different feature planning flow
expectations.evidence: result.md explicitly addresses the cross-feature/non-regression focus: "This holdout-regression case is specifically verifying that skill improvements made for the report-editor feature family do not regress a different feature planning flow" and further: "Cross-feature regression focus (explicit coverage) ... The orchestration model and spawn contract are generic and do not encode report-editor-only assumptions into the orchestrator loop."

expectations.text: [holdout_regression][blocking] Output aligns with primary phase holdout
expectations.evidence: result.md stays within a holdout regression determination and explicitly asserts holdout alignment: "What was checked (primary phase: holdout)" and "This output is intentionally limited to a holdout regression determination and does not attempt to generate multi-phase QA plan artifacts (Phase 4+ drafts, reviews, final), consistent with 'primary phase under test: holdout'."
